pageContext.name: Death Dealer III (Original)
pageContext.description: Sideshow Art Prints and the Frank Frazetta Art Museum present the Death Dealer III (Original) Fine Art Print by legendary fantasy artist Frank Frazetta. This essential fantasy artwork is one in a series of iconic designs the artist created of this signature character.  As an artist, Frank Frazetta was constantly challenging himself and reinventing his own imagery, especially when it came to the famed figure of the Death Dealer. The Death Dealer III (Original) illustration is one in a series of iconic designs the artist created, first introduced in 1987 and later used as the cover of James Silke's Lords of Destruction: Death Dealer Book 2. This depiction of Frazetta's ominous original character stands tall on the remains of a battlefield while smoke and ash billow around the hellscape. Armed with an axe and a sword, this menacing warrior stares with piercing red eyes at any who dare to challenge him.  Faithfully recreating all the fearsome details of this famous image, each Death Dealer III (Original) Fine Art Print features a hand-stamped, authorized signature of artist Frank Frazetta as well as the official Frazetta Art Museum embossed Seal of Authenticity. Each piece in the limited edition of 300 will also include a Certificate of Authenticity, and a portion of the proceeds will directly benefit the Frazetta Art Museum's preservation and exhibition of the artist's famed original works. Available unframed and in a custom framed format, this terrifying fantasy wall art makes an exciting addition to any collector's gallery.  Deliver a fatal blow and bring home the Death Dealer III (Original) Fine Art Print by Frank Frazetta today.
